Employment Opportunities

Thank you for your interest in working at The Elliott Community! 

In support of persons with disabilities, The Elliott Community asks that job applicants with disabilities who require accommodation in the recruitment and selection process please advise Human Resources if contacted for an interview so that a suitable accommodation can be arranged. (In compliance with AODA, 2006, Integrated Accessibility Standards 2011, Employment Standards). If you require assistance in completing a job application due to a disability, please contact Human Resources directly. Information collected during this process will be used for recruitment purposes only.

 

Please click the link(s) below for details of our current employment opportunities:

Maintenance Aide, Full Time

Information and Technology Team Lead

Chaplain, Part Time

 

We are always accepting applications for the positions below:

Registered Nurse

Registered Practical Nurse

Personal Support Worker

Food Service Worker

 

Please send your resume to humanresources@elliottcommunity.org with the position that you are interested in as the subject line.
